response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The reference JSON misattributed the timing/order of the songs 'Soirée' and 'Tenkyuu, Suisei wa Yoru wo Mataide'. 2. JSON Usage: Reorganized the lyrics from the reference JSON to match their actual sequence in the audio, and manually transcribed 'Soirée' since its references were null. 3. Timing & Pacing: Tightly aligned timestamps to rapid vocal changes and interactive callouts by the performer to maintain synchronized pacing.

subtitles.original: ...中まで
subtitles.english: ...to the point of trance.

subtitles.original: 秒針は音を立てて 夜を急かす
subtitles.english: The second hand makes a sound, hurrying the night.

subtitles.original: 守らなきゃ
subtitles.english: I have to protect it.

subtitles.original: 人生は一瞬にして 溶ける魔法
subtitles.english: Life is a magic that melts in an instant.

subtitles.original: それならば 駆け抜けて 私だけのストーリー...
subtitles.english: If so, I'll run through my own story.

subtitles.original: お邪魔な玩具は片付けて
subtitles.english: Put away those pesky toys,

subtitles.original: ドライビング 私も大変身メイクアップ
subtitles.english: driving, I also get a big transformation and make-up.

subtitles.original: 我儘 まにまに
subtitles.english: Selfish as I please,

subtitles.original: きらめきに注意注意 そわそわの街で ダンシング
subtitles.english: watch out for the sparkle! Dancing in this restless town.

subtitles.original: ありがとう！
subtitles.english: Thank you!

subtitles.original: みなみな！ ご唱和あれ！
subtitles.english: Everyone! Sing along!

subtitles.original: こんがらがってもしょうがないから 終電で繋いで
subtitles.english: It's no use getting tangled up, so connect us with the last train.

subtitles.original: 今宵にオファーはない ならば夢中になったもん勝ちでしょう
subtitles.english: There's no offer tonight, so whoever gets absorbed wins, right?

subtitles.original: うー！ 見えてるよー！
subtitles.english: Woo! I can see you!

subtitles.original: ライダリホ どんな問題も 会話ひとつ
subtitles.english: Raidariho! Any problem solved with a single conversation.

subtitles.original: 複数 正解も間違いも 合図 本当の私リセット
subtitles.english: Multiple correct and wrong answers, that's the cue to reset the real me.

subtitles.original: あわあわな世界は限界の気配がして...
subtitles.english: This bubbly world feels like it's reaching its limit.

subtitles.original: うだうだただ安心？いや心配？じゃあ今すぐジャンピンジャンピンナウ
subtitles.english: Just lazily feeling relieved? Or worried? Then jump, jump right now!

subtitles.original: チクタクバタチクタクバン 偉くだくだくに傷んだハート
subtitles.english: Tick-tock batter tick-tock bang, my severely worn-out heart.

subtitles.original: ギリギリばっかハプニングだった今 破綻してしまおうか
subtitles.english: It was nothing but close-shave happenings, should we break down now?

subtitles.original: 一発じゃあ全然足りないわ
subtitles.english: Just one shot is not nearly enough.

subtitles.original: 不意に導き出した 君に会った 灰になるまで踊ってよ
subtitles.english: Suddenly guided to meet you, dance until we turn to ash!

subtitles.original: いくよー！
subtitles.english: Here we go!

subtitles.original: 見えてるよ見えてるよ！...
subtitles.english: I can see you, I can see you!

subtitles.original: うー！
subtitles.english: Woo!

subtitles.original: お邪魔な玩具は片付けて
subtitles.english: Put away those pesky toys,

subtitles.original: ドライビング 私も大変身メイクアップ
subtitles.english: driving, I also get a big transformation and make-up.

subtitles.original: 我儘 まにまに
subtitles.english: Selfish as I please,
